title: tephrosia × smallii
intro: Tephrosia × smallii, also known as Small's tephrosia or Small's hoarypea, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and help lower blood pressure. The plant's leaves and stems contain a range of bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Tephrosia × smallii is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
